project_summary: Requirements draft from 7 utterances (Client, PM) with 3 functional requirements, 1 non-functional requirements, 1 constraints, and 3 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: We need a web system for a dental clinic where patients can book appointments.
Receptionists must see daily bookings and mark no-shows.
We cannot exceed a 3 month timeline.

non_functional_requirements.text: It should feel simple and user-friendly.

constraints.text: We cannot exceed a 3 month timeline.

open_questions.text: Ambiguous quality target needs clarification: It should feel simple and user-friendly.
How should this quality requirement be measured: It should feel simple and user-friendly.?

follow_up_questions: Can you clarify: Ambiguous quality target needs clarification: It should feel simple and user-friendly?

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: We need a web system for a dental clinic where patients can book appointments.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Receptionists must see daily bookings and mark no-shows.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: It has to work on old office PCs with slow internet.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: We cannot exceed a 3 month timeline.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: It should feel simple and user-friendly.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Yes, but we have not chosen an SMS vendor yet.
